_comment: PLACEHOLDER topics — replace title/angle/keyPoints with your real niche before a production run. status: pending | in_progress | done | blocked. The factory picks the first 'pending' entry.

topics.title: 3 ways AI saves clinicians time every day
topics.angle: Practical, non-hypey. Concrete tasks AI already handles well.
keyPoints: Surfacing relevant guidelines at the point of care
topics.cta: Follow for one practical AI workflow a day

topics.title: The one AI mistake that costs clinics hours
topics.angle: Cautionary but constructive — using AI without verification loops.
keyPoints: Build a human review step into every workflow
Measure time saved, not just tasks automated
topics.cta: Save this before your next AI rollout

topics.title: Why your AI notes still need a human check
topics.angle: Trust-but-verify. AI drafts fast, humans catch what matters.
keyPoints: AI drafts the note in seconds
It can still miss context and nuance
A ten-second human review catches the gaps

topics.title: The 4-week AI rollout playbook for clinics
topics.angle: Practical feedback-loop playbook, week by week.
keyPoints: Week 1-2: pick one workflow, measure the baseline
Week 3: AI drafts with a human reviewer on every output
Week 4: compare numbers, feed corrections back

topics.title: The mistake that burns your ad budget
topics.angle: Practical breakdown of how Meta ads work and how to attract clients with them.
keyPoints: Pick one goal: leads, sales, or traffic
Define your audience by interest, location, and behavior
Strong hook, clear benefit, one call to action
Start with five dollars a day, test three creatives, cut losers fast
topics.cta: Save this before your next ad campaign
